hero_subtitle: SFTY condenses wallet signals and transaction risk scores into a single compliance workflow, empowering teams to efficiently review, manage and escalate on-chain risks.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow

problem_title: Risk decisions become harder to defend
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to correlate multiple KYT risk scores and transaction signals from separate providers. This fragmentation slows risk assessment and weakens audit trail clarity needed for defensible compliance decisions across wallets and transactions.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects wallet activity, transaction risk signals and provider outputs into unified cases that preserve audit evidence and support compliance teams in defensible, streamlined risk decision workflows.
workflow_title: From wallet risk signals to case review
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet and transaction risk scores from multiple providers then routes alerts into structured cases for compliance review and evidence preservation.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond wallet alerts. One compliance layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY aggregates and connects wallet and transaction risk data from multiple providers into structured workflows, cases, decisions and evidence for clearer compliance control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with a controlled compliance layer that connects wallet and transaction risk data into audit-ready evidence for scalable bank due diligence and deployment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides compliance teams a connected platform to connect wallet, transaction, and provider risk signals into structured workflows, cases, decisions, evidence, and reports for digital asset monitoring.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY aggregate KYT risk signals?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates wallet and transaction risk scores from multiple KYT and blockchain analytics providers into one interface, linking alerts to customers, counterparties, cases, and internal compliance policies.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case histories, decision logs, provider outputs and supporting evidence with controlled audit records to support audit readiness and due diligence reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY connects with your existing KYT, analytics, screening, Travel Rule and KYC providers to connect their outputs into a controlled compliance operating layer without replacing them.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYT or analytics providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYT or analytics providers but layers their data and alerts into structured compliance workflows, risk aggregation, review, case management and reporting.
final_title: Connect aggregated wallet and transaction scores
final_description: Review how SFTY combines KYT risk scores and wallet signals into one structured compliance workflow for VASP teams.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
